scenarios: features/verification-economy.feature:Every scenario that runs records its wall-clock cost
features/verification-economy.feature:An interactive scenario waits for the prompt it is answering, never a guessed delay
features/methodology-conformance.feature:Every plank sits in a docblock on the declaration it describes
features/methodology-conformance.feature:Every plank names a step that still exists in a feature
features/012-existing-saleor-store-connection.feature:The environment-creation request body is built by one seam, so the previewed request is the one that is sent
features/025-agent-skill-affordance-eval.feature:The run records what every agent turn cost and which Jolly command it ran
features/025-agent-skill-affordance-eval.feature:Jolly's error output carries the recovery, so the agent never falls back to reading help
